channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Blackstone takes the majority position in Google’s new TPU cloud
item.description: The two have formed a joint venture to build a US-based AI compute-as-a-service business on Google’s TPUs, with $5bn of Blackstone equity, $25bn total deal value including leverage, and 500 MW of capacity targeted for 2027. Blackstone and Google have formed a… [Alphabet]

item.title: Google, Blackstone to create AI cloud firm with in-house chips
item.description: The move adds to a boom in spending on computing infrastructure, which underpins AI models and services. Read more at straitstimes.com. Read more at straitstimes.com. [Alphabet]

item.title: Meta Hyperion Louisiana data center expansion details #tech
item.description: Meta is developing its Hyperion data center campus in Louisiana with an expected scale of 5 gigawatts of compute capacity, according to a report that frames it as one of the largest AI infrastructure undertakings in the U.S. The project is described as involv… [Meta]
